title: Majesty Realms
description: Majesty Realms is a 1.20.1-based modpack that transforms Minecraft into a legendary adventure! Packed with RPG classes, visual enhancements, and exploration-focused content, it delivers an immersive experience with optimized performance.
body:
🌟 Majesty Realms Modpack 🌟
Transform Minecraft into a Legendary Adventure!

Majesty Realms is a meticulously crafted Fabric-based modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1, designed to elevate your gameplay into an epic saga of exploration, strategy, and visual splendor. With RPG classes, breathtaking dimensions, and optimized performance, this modpack redefines what it means to conquer blocky worlds—solo or with allies!
🎯 Why Majesty Realms?

    🌌 A Visual Masterpiece:
    Iris Shaders deliver cinematic lighting, AzureLib brings silky-smooth animations, and Dynamic Surroundings adds immersive rain, wind, and ambient sounds. Every biome feels alive!

    ⚔️ Hardcore RPG Mechanics:
    Choose your destiny as a Berserker, Witcher, or Spellblade! Unlock unique skill trees, craft legendary gear, and dominate battles with Elemental Wizards and Soulslike Weaponry.

    🗺️ Dimensions of Wonder:
    Traverse the alien landscapes of Better End, survive the hellish reforms of Better Nether, and raid 10+ colossal dungeons from YUNG's Mods.

    🚀 Performance Meets Beauty:
    Sodium and Lithium boost FPS, FerriteCore slashes memory usage, and MemoryLeakFix ensures long sessions stay smooth.

✨ Key Features

    ✈️ Soar the Skies: Pilot customizable aircraft with Immersive Aircraft.

    🍜 Gourmet Survival: Cook feasts with Farmer’s Delight and trade with smarter villagers via VillagersPlus.

    🎭 Express Yourself: Dance with Emotecraft and customize your avatar with SkinLayers3D.

    🔮 Magic & Mayhem: Wield elemental spells, summon creatures, and brew chaos with Spellblade Next and Malum.

    🏰 Build Your Legacy: Decorate with Supplementaries and Convenient Decor, then fast-travel using Wraith Waystones.

📜 Changelog (v1.0.0)

    🚀 New Features: RPG classes, Immersive Aircraft, 10+ YUNG's dungeons.

    ⚡ Optimizations: Sodium FPS boost, reduced memory leaks.

    🎨 Visuals: AzureLib animations, Dynamic Surroundings ambience.

    🐛 Fixes: Better End conflicts resolved, UI stabilization.

⚠️ Requirements

    Minecraft 1.20.1 | Fabric API | Java 17+

    Recommended Specs: 8GB RAM, mid-tier GPU for shaders.

✨ "Your legend begins here. Will you rule the realms?" ✨
